description: Shallow Wooden Wine boxes Dimensions approx 50cm x 33cm x 10cm however some can vary depending on the winery. Rustic, charming and practical wooden crates Pretty enough to simply dress a space but practical enough to be used for any number of storage purposes We have sold many of these to retailers to display their products on and also equally as many to many households who have used them to solve the everyday problem of storage in the home! Use in your own home to store magazines, display your favourite objects or tidy away general household bits n' pieces in a stylish way! Due to the vast quantity we sell, we cannot guarantee a specific brand of wine on the box, they will all be picked at random.
